releases.author: solorpgstudio
releases.description:
Initial release of RPG Detect Dice Roll, an Obsidian plugin for tabletop RPG notes.

Detects dice formulas in reading view and makes them clickable.

Supports common formulas like d20, 1d20 + 4, 2d6 - 1, plus keep/drop notation such as 4d6kh3, 2d20kl1, 4d6dl1, and 4d6dh1.

Adds a roll history side panel with recent results and timestamps.

Includes manual roll controls with quick dice buttons, operators, advantage, and disadvantage.

Supports custom formula dice buttons and custom narrative dice with optional weighted odds, including numbers, percentages, and fractions.

Adds optional roll result notices, enabled by default, with configurable placement.

Provides settings for formula display style, history limit, roll notices, manual controls, built-in dice buttons, custom dice, and light/dark UI colors.

Runs locally/offline with no telemetry or network requests.
